visuals.title: SYSGEN Process Flow
visuals.description: Diagram showing how the SYSGEN process takes hardware information and produces a configured OS kernel

diagrams.title: OS Generation Process
steps: Choose generation approach (recompile, table-driven, or modular)
Boot the system with the new kernel
diagrams.notes: Modern Linux uses the modular approach (LKM) most commonly. The make menuconfig tool provides a menu-driven configuration interface.
